# AuraCRM

> AuraCRM is an ambient, voice-first client operations engine for premium independent professionals
> (coaches, consultants, therapists, concierge physicians, wealth advisors). A practitioner speaks a
> short update after a session; AuraCRM transcribes it and produces proposals the practitioner
> reviews and approves — an engagement-stage change, a style-matched follow-up email, professional
> tasks, client homework, and overage invoices. Nothing is sent or charged without approval.

## Key facts

- Tagline: "Your back office, run by your voice."
- Docs: https://auracrm-docs.aoneahsan.com
- App: https://auracrm.aoneahsan.com
- Sign-in: Google (web and mobile). No passwords.
- AI: OpenAI (whisper-1 transcription, gpt-4o-mini reasoning); PII is redacted before the LLM.
- Voice capture is foreground tap-to-record today; ambient background capture is a future phase.
- HIPAA-ready architecture; not HIPAA-certified (certification is at go-live).
- Billing is a direct bank/account transfer via https://aoneahsan.com/payment — no card processor.

## Plans

- Free: $0/mo, 2 AI runs/month.
- Starter: $49/mo, 10 AI runs/month.
- Professional: $129/mo, unlimited AI runs.
- Firm: $299/mo+, unlimited AI runs.
